text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's this... "Trending! The Best of the Best
Umamusume."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well, obviously, number one has to be me, King—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh? I'm... I'm not?! Then that means—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I must already be listed in their Hall of Fame. ♪
This magazine certainly has great taste.
